nodes.name: collate.icu.utf8.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for ICU-based UTF-8 collation, testing locale-sensitive string comparison and sorting with ICU collation provider.

nodes.name: collate.linux.utf8.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for Linux libc UTF-8 collation, testing locale-aware string ordering and comparison on Linux systems.

nodes.name: collate.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for base collation support, testing CREATE COLLATION, COLLATE clause, and collation inheritance.

nodes.name: combocid.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for combo command ID (cmin/cmax) behavior in transactions, testing MVCC visibility edge cases.

nodes.name: comments.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for COMMENT ON statements, testing metadata comments on tables, columns, functions, and other objects.

nodes.name: compression.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for TOAST compression options (pglz, lz4), testing column compression method specification.

nodes.name: contrib-pgcrypto-rijndael.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for pgcrypto Rijndael (AES) encryption functions, testing encrypt/decrypt operations.

nodes.name: conversion.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for character set conversion functions and CREATE CONVERSION statements.

nodes.name: copy2.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for COPY command (file import/export), testing various COPY format options and error handling.

nodes.name: copydml.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for COPY FROM with DML triggers, testing how COPY interacts with trigger execution.

nodes.name: copyselect.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for COPY (SELECT ...) TO syntax, testing selective data export with query-based COPY.

nodes.name: create_aggregate.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE AGGREGATE statements, testing user-defined aggregate function creation and invocation.

nodes.name: create_am.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE ACCESS METHOD, testing pluggable table and index access method registration.

nodes.name: create_cast.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE CAST statements, testing user-defined type cast creation and invocation.

nodes.name: create_function_3.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for advanced CREATE FUNCTION features including PL/pgSQL, security definer, and function overloading.

nodes.name: create_index.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE INDEX statements, covering B-tree, partial, expression, and multi-column index creation.

nodes.name: create_index_spgist.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for SP-GiST (Space-Partitioned GiST) index creation and query usage.

nodes.name: create_misc.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for miscellaneous CREATE statements including schemas, sequences, and various object types.

nodes.name: create_operator.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE OPERATOR statements, testing user-defined operator creation with commutator and negator definitions.

nodes.name: create_procedure.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test SQL for CREATE PROCEDURE statements, testing stored procedure creation, invocation, and transaction control within procedures.
